content: Reasoner benchmark literature (OWL2Bench/ISWC-era comparisons): Konclude leads overall OWL 2 DL performance; HermiT is the strongest of the classic open reasoners for consistency checking; Pellet has notable reliability issues (datatype/syntax errors), Openllet fixes many of them; ELK is EL-profile-only (fast, low-memory classification) and not a substitute for full DL consistency checking — useful only as an optional pre-classifier on large TBoxes, not as DG's primary reasoner given DG's ontology is not EL-restricted.
